content: The state-of-the-art active learning agent memory systems emerging in 2024–2025 can be repurposed to store and replay *curiosity signature traces* (patterns of prediction error that drive intrinsic reward in ICM/RND methods), solving the longstanding problem of catastrophic forgetting of unexplored state distributions in sparse-reward environments.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
